method.name: llm_reasoned
method.description: Compute statistical pairwise evidence, then ask an LLM to reason over stop-profile, representative route-image, and fleet-metadata evidence to produce final pairwise total_correlation values.

route_similarity.description: For each truck, choose the representative image from each route cluster, compare representative route-ink vectors by cosine similarity, and average pairwise similarities weighted by cluster shares.

method.global_rationale: Correlation values derived from behavioral features indicate heavy reliance on the combination of stop profile correlations, purpose alignment, and observed operational behaviors.
risks: High reliance on inconsistent features leading to skewed interpretations.

pairwise_argument_correlations.llm_rationale: Strong correlation due to high stop profile and duty cycle match, despite low route similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: High correlation indicates similar stopping behaviors.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low similarity suggests different routes but doesn't negate overall similarity.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Identical purpose and high duty cycle match enhance overall behavioral resemblance.
